name: Internet Trust Engine MVP Scaffold
avoid_language: artifact-level trust score as the MVP anchor
controlling_principle: CyberShield does not ask whether we trust a person. It asks which claims, artifacts, evidence paths, and reliance decisions can be trusted, at what confidence, for what purpose, and with what risk if wrong.
boundary: Static advisory prototype scaffold only. No live internet retrieval, live evidence retrieval, live claim extraction, live scoring, political validation, legal determination, or automated verification is performed.
mvp_purpose: Create a prototype scaffold for reviewing internet artifacts by ingesting artifact metadata and text, decomposing claims, mapping evidence states, checking reliance risk, and producing Proof Pack-ready output.
mvp_flow: Model trace to Core Trust Scoring Models
Decision record and Proof Pack output

pilot_artifact.title: USAFacts / Steve Ballmer government responsibilities video
pilot_artifact.why_useful: Appears factual and data-driven, but still requires validation of fiscal numbers, government entity definitions, Medicaid funding rules, education funding splits, time periods, and future legal-policy shifts.
pilot_artifact.reliance_purpose: Executive education, civic literacy, decision support, public briefing preparation, and artifact trust demonstration
pilot_artifact.prototype_boundary: Pilot scaffold only. No live transcript retrieval, live source retrieval, or automated verification.

sample_claim_rows.sentence: Federal, state, and local governments divide responsibility for public services in different ways.
sample_claim_rows.next_step: Verify against official government data definitions before using in executive briefing.

sample_claim_rows.sentence: Medicaid funding involves both federal and state government responsibility.
sample_claim_rows.reliance_risk: high if used for policy or financial decision
sample_claim_rows.next_step: Verify current Medicaid matching rules and state-specific context before reliance.

sample_claim_rows.sentence: Education funding responsibilities differ across federal, state, and local levels.
sample_claim_rows.reliance_risk: moderate to high depending on jurisdiction and year
sample_claim_rows.next_step: Verify funding splits by year, jurisdiction, and source methodology.

runtime_action_rule: If evidence is missing, stale, conflicting, or unverified for a high-stakes reliance purpose, CyberShield should escalate or constrain reliance until evidence is reviewed by a qualified human.
definition_of_done: Scaffold appears in existing workspaces only
Pilot artifact is clearly labeled as a scaffold
Proof Pack output is advisory and boundary-protected
Model trace routes to existing Trust Scoring Models
